grouping_principle: Dedicated packages are required when an RFE cannot be safely and completely represented by an implemented package without semantic substitution.

coverage_goal: lump pain nipple discharge skin inflammation lactation implant and follow-up routing
site laterality onset course mandatory pain NRS and functional impact
severe infection bleeding trauma abscess and time-sensitive breast warning features
professional personal family reproductive medicine procedure imaging and treatment history
information source reliability missing data patient concern and clinician handoff

definition_of_done: official-source research manifest and refresh metadata
SNOMED CT terminology and MRCM alignment with uncertainty preserved
safety Rules with emergency urgent and time-sensitive explanation
normal boundary emergency ambiguous dataAbsentReason proxy unrelated-comment and multi-RFE simulations
clinician handoff includes collected required missing and conflicting package Facts
privacy validator build unit simulation and Coverage gates pass
constraints: Do not substitute an implemented package solely because it contains one related Fact.
Do not infer diagnosis from the Reason for Encounter.
Keep generated content unreviewed and research_only until review.
